purpose: Clean product root for the reusable workspace engine, platform shells, optional persistence adapters, and companion server planning.

entrypoints.description: Human overview of package products, layout, and verification commands.
Project-specific working rules for coding agents.
Durable architecture split between engine, adapters, platform shells, and server companion.
Phased implementation plan with outcomes, acceptance criteria, and sequencing.
Server-side scope with iCloud as primary storage.
Target graph, product responsibilities, and dependency rules.
Local verification, XcodeGen, package tests, and demo builds.
Consumer adoption guide index for Mac, iOS, engine-only, custom renderer, persistence, CloudKit, and prototype migration paths.
Public API, package boundary, adapter, renderer, and documentation review checklist.
Completed 0.1.0 public API stability review and release gates.
Semantic versioning, release verification, manual review, tagging, and post-release checklist.
